\tzpentry{ID5622}{Quantum Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5622 introduces Quantum Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mu_B = e\hbar/(2m_e) = 9.274 \times 10^{-24}$
\]
